texto: Is it a time for you, you I say, to dwell in your roofed-in houses?' (Haggai 1:4). The reply might have been that it was unreasonable to expect anyone to live in a roofless house, but the question made its point. What worth did they set on their God, when they left His Temple in ruins?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Joyce G. Baldwin que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Is it a time for you, you I say, to dwell in your roofed-in houses?' (Haggai 1:4). The reply migh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, god, haggai, com foco em haggai.

The reply might have been that it was unreasonable to expect anyone to live in a roofless house, but the question made its point.
